name: Berry Melon Cupcakes
description: Delicate vanilla cupcakes topped with vibrant berry mousse and a touch of melon essence.

name: Bridal Cake
description: A majestic multi-tier elegant blue and cream cake, decorated with gold leaf and edible pearls.

name: Dark Moist Cake
description: Luxuriously rich chocolate devil's food cake, enveloped in a smooth dark chocolate ganache and chocolate curls.

name: Heart Shape Ribbons
description: Charming heart-shaped vintage piped pink cake, adorned with elegant black silk ribbons.

name: Mermaid Cupcakes
description: Whimsical teal and purple swirled buttercream cupcakes topped with beautiful mermaid tails and sea dust.

name: Midnight Daisy
description: A striking matte dark chocolate frosting cake, meticulously decorated with delicate white chamomile daisies.

name: Number Cupcakes
description: Bespoke cupcakes meticulously arranged in custom digit displays for anniversaries and birthdays.

name: Pastel Blossom and Cupcake Platter
description: A grand combination of a matching mini birthday cake and custom-decorated buttercream blossom cupcakes.

name: Pink Blossom Drip
description: Whimsical white-frosted cake with a dreamy pink pastel drip, topped with fresh meringue blossoms.

name: Pink Pearl Cupcakes
description: Scrumptious pink velvet cupcakes, piped with premium pink cream cheese frosting and pearl details.

name: Sacred Grace Blossom
description: An elegant, peaceful communion or wedding cake decorated with a gold cross and fresh spring blossoms.

name: Triple Truple Chocolate
description: A chocolate lover's dream featuring a triple layer of dark, milk, and white chocolate ganache.

name: Choco Lava with Biscoff
description: Chewy double chocolate crinkles with a molten center, topped with crunchy Lotus Biscoff speculoos.

name: Classic Choco
description: Fudgy, melt-in-your-mouth crinkle cookies generously rolled in powdered sugar dust.

name: Classic Matcha
description: Uji matcha green tea crinkles with a brilliant jade color and a perfect powdered exterior.

name: Matcha Lava
description: Green tea matcha crinkles oozing with a rich white-chocolate matcha molten cream center.

name: Matcha Lava with Biscoff
description: Matcha lava crinkles flavored with Lotus Biscoff speculoos crumbs for a caramel spice twist.

name: Cinnamon with Yema Filling
description: Soft, freshly rolled sweet dough rolls filled with cinnamon and gooey, local Filipino Yema custard.

name: Cream Cheeze Garlic
description: Garlicky buns stuffed with sweetened cream cheese and dipped in savory salted garlic butter.

name: Garlic Bread Supremacy
description: Crisp toasted french bread slathered with extra rich butter-garlic spread, herbs, and parmesan.

name: Korean Garlic
description: Famous pull-apart flower sweet buns stuffed with sweet cream cheese and drenched in premium savory garlic glaze.
